title: dendrosenecio johnstonii subsp. cottonii
intro: Dendrosenecio johnstonii subsp. cottonii, also known as Giant Chrysanthemum or Senecio cottonii, is a rare and endangered succulent plant native to the high-altitude regions of Mount Kenya. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating fever, wounds, and skin conditions. The leaves and stems of Dendrosenecio johnstonii subsp. cottonii are rich in sesquiterpene lactones, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and salves, which are used to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate fever.
